title: cryptostylis hamadryas
intro: Cryptostylis hamadryas, also known as the Hamadryad's Tongue Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cryptostylis hamadryas are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to soothe and protect the skin. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is said to have been used by indigenous Australians for various medicinal purposes.
